title: Backpacks
body:
# Backpacks

[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1327308441324097681?label=discord&color=blue&logo=discord)](https://discord.gg/5UdcDa5xNC)
[![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/ly-backpacks?label=modrinth&logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/ly-backpacks)
[![License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/lullaby6/data-packs)](https://github.com/lullaby6/data-packs/blob/main/LICENSE)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/-MKwdk4z2_0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

<hr>

## 📖 Description

Very simple backpacks! use your first inventory slots to store items in a backpack!

When you Right-Click on the backpack, you open it and the first line of slots in the inventory are from the backpack, you can store your items there, then you Right-Click on the backpack again and it closes and you get your normal inventory back.

No command is executed per tick, it's the best performing backpacks data-pack ever!

<hr>

## 🛠️ Recipe

![Recipe](https://i.imgur.com/HVD3sa8.png)

<hr>

## ⌨️ Commands

Give:

```mcfunction
/loot give @s loot backpacks:backpack
```
